flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at William Carey University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (87.4% → 77.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at William Carey University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (40.8% vs 49.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at William Carey University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at William Carey University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (37.5% → 45.2%).
